OnSpellStart.label: Deal Damage to Target
OnSpellStart.template: ApplyDamage({ victim = target, attacker = caster, damage = ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}"), damage_type = {{damage_type}} })

OnSpellStart.label: Knockback Target
OnSpellStart.template: target:AddNewModifier(caster, ability, "modifier_knockback", { duration = {{duration}}, knockback_duration = {{duration}}, knockback_distance = {{distance}}, knockback_height = {{height}}, center_x = caster:GetOrigin().x, center_y = caster:GetOrigin().y, center_z = caster:GetOrigin().z })

OnSpellStart.label: Find Units in Radius
OnSpellStart.template: local units = FindUnitsInRadius(caster:GetTeamNumber(), caster:GetOrigin(), nil, ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}"), {{target_team}}, {{target_type}}, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_FLAG_NONE, FIND_ANY_ORDER, false)

OnSpellStart.label: Create Thinker at Cast Point
OnSpellStart.template: CreateModifierThinker(caster, ability, "{{modifier_name}}", { duration = {{duration}} }, point, caster:GetTeamNumber(), false)

OnSpellStart.label: Fire Tracking Projectile at Target
OnSpellStart.template: ProjectileManager:CreateTrackingProjectile({ Target = target, Source = caster, Ability = ability, EffectName = "{{particle}}", bDodgeable = true, iMoveSpeed = {{speed}}, flExpireTime = GameRules:GetGameTime() + 10 })

OnSpellStart.label: Fire Linear Projectile
OnSpellStart.template: ProjectileManager:CreateLinearProjectile({ Source = caster, Ability = ability, EffectName = "{{particle}}", vSpawnOrigin = caster:GetOrigin(), fDistance = {{distance}}, fStartRadius = {{radius}}, fEndRadius = {{radius}}, iUnitTargetTeam = DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_TEAM_ENEMY, iUnitTargetType = DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_HERO + DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_BASIC, bHasFrontalCone = false, bReplaceExisting = false, fExpireTime = GameRules:GetGameTime() + 10, vVelocity = (point - caster:GetOrigin()):Normalized() * {{speed}} })

OnSpellStart.label: Blink Caster to Point
OnSpellStart.template:
local blink_range = ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}")
local direction = (point - caster:GetOrigin()):Normalized()
local distance = math.min((point - caster:GetOrigin()):Length2D(), blink_range)
caster:SetOrigin(caster:GetOrigin() + direction * distance)
FindClearSpaceForUnit(caster, caster:GetOrigin(), true)

OnChannelFinish.label: Deal Damage to Target (if not interrupted)
OnChannelFinish.template:
if not interrupted then
        ApplyDamage({ victim = target, attacker = caster, damage = ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}"), damage_type = {{damage_type}} })
    end

OnChannelFinish.label: Apply Modifier to Target (if not interrupted)
OnChannelFinish.template:
if not interrupted then
        target:AddNewModifier(caster, ability, "{{modifier_name}}", { duration = {{duration}} })
    end

OnChannelFinish.label: Find Units in Radius (if not interrupted)
OnChannelFinish.template:
if not interrupted then
        local units = FindUnitsInRadius(caster:GetTeamNumber(), caster:GetOrigin(), nil, ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}"), {{target_team}}, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_ALL, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_FLAG_NONE, FIND_ANY_ORDER, false)
    end

OnChannelThink.label: Deal Damage to Nearby Enemies
OnChannelThink.template:
local units = FindUnitsInRadius(caster:GetTeamNumber(), caster:GetOrigin(), nil, ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{radius_value}}"), DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_TEAM_ENEMY, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_ALL, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_FLAG_NONE, FIND_ANY_ORDER, false)
for _, unit in ipairs(units) do
        ApplyDamage({ victim = unit, attacker = caster, damage = ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}") * interval, damage_type = {{damage_type}} })
    end

OnProjectileHit.label: Deal Damage to Hit Target
OnProjectileHit.template:
if target ~= nil then
        ApplyDamage({ victim = target, attacker = caster, damage = ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}"), damage_type = {{damage_type}} })
    end

OnProjectileHit.label: Apply Modifier to Hit Target
OnProjectileHit.template:
if target ~= nil then
        target:AddNewModifier(caster, ability, "{{modifier_name}}", { duration = {{duration}} })
    end

OnProjectileHit.label: Stun Hit Target
OnProjectileHit.template:
if target ~= nil then
        target:AddNewModifier(caster, ability, "modifier_stunned", { duration = {{duration}} })
    end

OnProjectileHit.label: AoE Damage at Impact Point
OnProjectileHit.template:
local units = FindUnitsInRadius(caster:GetTeamNumber(), location, nil, ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{radius_value}}"), DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_TEAM_ENEMY, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_ALL, DOTA_UNIT_TARGET_FLAG_NONE, FIND_ANY_ORDER, false)
    for _, unit in ipairs(units) do
        ApplyDamage({ victim = unit, attacker = caster, damage = ability:GetSpecialValueFor("{{special_value}}"), damage_type = {{damage_type}} })
    end

OnUpgrade.label: Log Level Up (Debug)
OnUpgrade.template: print("[Debug] " .. ability:GetAbilityName() .. " upgraded to level " .. level)

OnUpgrade.label: Refresh Modifier on Upgrade
OnUpgrade.template:
if caster:HasModifier("{{modifier_name}}") then
        caster:RemoveModifierByName("{{modifier_name}}")
        caster:AddNewModifier(caster, ability, "{{modifier_name}}", {})
    end
